ab: Maiza tatini ka tukuzaku, malabuntu ka cia minpungul is mama’az.
ch: 我有一個同學，他常常忘記帶東西。
en: I have a classmate named Qanciaz, he often forgets to bring things.

ab: Tudiip maca masipul, simul a cia ispapatas, isqaqaisqais cina papatasan ha’an tukucia.
ch: 上課的時候，他跟同學借鉛筆、橡皮擦或是筆記本。
en: During class, he borrowed pencils, erasers or notebooks from his classmates.

ab: Maca muc’anang, mupusan, muti’un a, na pasilulanang is duma’ a cia mama’az.
ch: 一次、兩次、三次，大家會借東西給他。
en: Once, twice, three times, everyone would lend him something.

ab: Uutu, maiza ca madikla’a talmaupa’an cia, malabuntu sisimul is mama’az a nii’ tu macuqais.
ch: 但是他有個壞習慣，經常借了東西卻不還。
en: But he has a bad habit of often borrowing things but not returning them.

ab: Ihiku’in a nii’in ca duma’ asa pasimul cia mama’az.
ch: 最後大家都不想借他東西了。
en: In the end, no one wanted to borrow anything from him.

ab: Maiza tatdiqanin, muskun azam mudadaan kavivila’.
ch: 有一天，我們大家一起去郊遊。
en: One day, we all went on an outing together.

ab: Panmicqang is daan a, si’a’auma kat Qanciaz, uutu minpungul a cia madas is haqailqaisqais.
ch: 路途中，Qanciaz想上廁所，但他忘記帶衛生紙。
en: On the way, Qanciaz wanted to go to the bathroom, but he forgot to bring toilet paper.

ab: Makus’aiv a cia haqailqaisqais ha’an tukucia, uutu mu’amin ca duma’ antalam tupa tu, nii’ azam amin madas.
ch: 他跟同學借衛生紙，可是大家都回他說，我也沒有帶耶。
en: He borrowed toilet paper from his classmates, but everyone told him that I didn’t bring them either.

ab: Tangic at Qanciaz dii nii’in maqanciap tu na masikua. Mahau’ a cia tupa tu, makua amuu cuna mu’amin nii’ tu pasimul zakun is haqailqaisqais!
ch: Qanciaz不知所措就哭了出來。他生氣的說，為什麼你們都不借我衛生紙!
en: Qanciaz burst into tears. He said angrily, why don’t everyone lend me toilet paper!

ab: Taqu’an tukucia kat cia tu, nii’ asuu anak’anak andas’andas, maupa amin tu, na ispasimul su’un ca mama’az a, nii’ asu lungulungu macuqais!
ch: 同學告訴他，因為你都不自己帶，而且借給你的東西，你都不會還!
en: The classmate told him, because you didn’t bring it yourself, and you wouldn’t return the things lent to you!

ab: Muqnin masipul tu lakbingin, kantingmut sala kat Qanciaz munsipulan, aminun Qanciaz ca sinimul cia ka mama’az macuqais iscaiv is tukucia.
ch: 隔天上學，Qanciaz很早就到學校了，Qanciaz把跟同學借的東西都還給同學們。
en: The next day at school, Qanciaz arrived at school early and returned everything he had borrowed from his classmates.

ab: Sumsumun Qanciaz ca tukucia, tupa amin tu na anak’anakin a cia madas is mama’az, masumsum amin is tukucia dii mina’is’ang pasimul cias mama’az tu tangausang.
ch: Qanciaz向同學們道歉，並說他以後一定會自己帶東西，也謝謝同學們之前願意借他東西。
en: Qanciaz apologized to the students and said that he would definitely bring his own things in the future, and thanked the classmates for their willingness to lend him things before.
